title: Mob Stacker: Integration
description: Integrates Mob Stacker with other mods
body:
Adds support for mod logic to properly handle stacks from [Mob Stacker](https://modrinth.com/mod/mob-stacker).

#### Currently supports:

- **Botania**: Shedding
- **Botania**: Drum of Gathering [**F**]
- **MineFactory Reloaded**: Mechanisms that work with mobs 
- **Thaumcraft**: Lamp of Fertility [**F**]

Items marked with F requires [Mob Stacker: Farming](https://modrinth.com/mod/mob-stacker-farming) addon.
